landing.heroDescription: Scan your code for security issues with static analysis and AI-powered explanations developers can actually understand.
landing.publicScanHint: Scan any public GitHub repository — no sign-in required
landing.whyVexlitDescription: Enterprise-grade security scanning with the simplicity of a single command.
landing.securityRulesDescription: Comprehensive coverage across injection, secrets, crypto, and more.
landing.moreRules: + 70 more SAST rules and 200+ secret detectors
landing.ctaDescription: Connect your GitHub repository and get a comprehensive security scan in seconds. Free to use.

features.astAnalysisDesc: Hybrid regex + AST scanning with tree-sitter for JavaScript, TypeScript, and Python reduces false positives by understanding code structure.
features.sastRulesDesc: Covers OWASP Top 10 including SQL Injection, XSS, SSRF, Command Injection, Prototype Pollution. Plus 200+ secret detectors.
features.githubIntegrationDesc: One-click repo scanning. SARIF output for GitHub Code Scanning. Results appear directly in your Security tab.
features.aiVerificationDesc: Claude AI secondary analysis filters false positives, explains vulnerabilities in detail, and suggests code fixes.
features.scanHistoryDesc: Track vulnerability trends over time with visual charts. See your security posture improve with each commit.
features.freeOpenSourceDesc: CLI and core engine are open source. Use locally, in CI/CD, or through the web dashboard. MIT licensed.

sections.beforeAfterDesc: See how VEXLIT catches vulnerabilities that manual review misses.
sections.scanOutputDesc: Real terminal output from scanning a Node.js project.
sections.howItWorksDesc: Three simple steps to secure your code.
sections.step1Desc: Link your GitHub repository with one click. Public or private, we scan it all.
sections.step2Desc: 85+ SAST rules and 200+ secret detectors analyze your code using AST-based static analysis in seconds.
sections.step3Desc: Get actionable fix suggestions with code examples. AI explains each vulnerability clearly.
sections.jsTsDesc: Full AST analysis with tree-sitter and @typescript-eslint.
sections.pythonDesc: Tree-sitter AST parsing for Python-specific vulnerability patterns.
sections.secretsAllDesc: 200+ patterns detect API keys across any file type.
sections.comparisonDesc: See how we stack up against other security tools.
sections.benchmarkDesc: We tested VEXLIT against 11,100+ parameterized code samples across 12 vulnerability categories using Monte Carlo-style randomized testing.
sections.reducedRiskDesc: VEXLIT catches 98.6% of vulnerabilities with zero false positives — meaning every finding is real and actionable, saving developers hours of false alarm triage.
sections.benchmarkFootnote: Benchmark run on 11,100 parameterized test cases with randomized variable names, function names, and code structures. Results verifiable via open-source benchmark suite.

liveDemo.title: Try it now
liveDemo.description: Paste code below to see VEXLIT in action.
liveDemo.placeholder: Paste JavaScript or TypeScript code here...
liveDemo.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
liveDemo.fullScanUnavailable: Full scan unavailable. Showing quick results.

repoScan.invalidUrl: Enter a valid GitHub repository URL
repoScan.publicOnly: Public repositories only. No sign-in required.

publicScan.ctaTitle: Want AI explanations, trend tracking, and more?
publicScan.ctaDesc: Sign in to get AI-powered fix suggestions, scan history, and continuous monitoring.
